qi_gathering.label: Qi Gathering
qi_gathering.description: +55% qi from cultivation (stacks charges per pill)

clarity.label: Clarity
clarity.description: +14% breakthrough stability per charge (stacks; consumed on attempt)

flow_pill.label: Flow Meridian
flow_pill.description: Shaves 15 min off your next 2 command cooldowns (stackable)

meridian_surge_pill.label: Meridian Surge
meridian_surge_pill.description: Shaves 15 min off your next 3 command cooldowns (stackable)

gatebreaker_dust.label: Gatebreaker Dust
gatebreaker_dust.description: Shaves 40 min off your next 2 command cooldowns (stackable)

void_pulse_pill.label: Void Pulse
void_pulse_pill.description: Shaves 60 min off your next 2 command cooldowns (stackable)
